long long solve(std::vector<long long> landStartTime, std::vector<long long> landDuration, std::vector<long long> waterStartTime, std::vector<long long> waterDuration) {
    long long min_time = LONG_LONG_MAX;

    // Try all combinations of one land and one water attraction
    for (size_t i = 0; i < landStartTime.size(); ++i) {
        for (size_t j = 0; j < waterStartTime.size(); ++j) {
            // Land first, then water
            long long land_end = std::max(landStartTime[i], (long long)0) + landDuration[i];
            long long water_start = std::max(land_end, waterStartTime[j]);
            long long water_end = water_start + waterDuration[j];
            min_time = std::min(min_time, water_end);

            // Water first, then land
            long long water_end_first = std::max(waterStartTime[j], (long long)0) + waterDuration[j];
            long long land_start = std::max(water_end_first, landStartTime[i]);
            long long land_end_second = land_start + landDuration[i];
            min_time = std::min(min_time, land_end_second);
        }
    }

    return min_time;
}

long long solve(std::vector<long long> landStartTime, std::vector<long long> landDuration, std::vector<long long> waterStartTime, std::vector<long long> waterDuration) {
    long long min_time = LONG_LONG_MAX;

        for (size_t j = 0; j < waterStartTime.size(); ++j) {

            long long land_end_second = land_start + landDuration[i];
            min_time = std::min(min_time, land_end_second);
        }
    }

    return min_time;
}
